scripts.build: npm run build -w @readwebsite/shared && npm run build -w @readwebsite/api && npm run build -w @readwebsite/extension
scripts.test: npm run test -w @readwebsite/shared && npm run test -w @readwebsite/api && npm run test -w @readwebsite/extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @readwebsite/shared && npm run typecheck -w @readwebsite/api && npm run typecheck -w @readwebsite/extension
